goal: Transfer ownership cleanly: a credentials/reference doc, a system walkthrough, legacy-repo archival verification, and a pointer to ERP closure — all as builder-verifiable artifacts in docs/admin/.
why: Final phase of Milestone 9 — converts a shipped, documented system into an owned one the new owner can run, deploy, and trust from three docs without the original author.
success_criteria: docs/admin/handoff-credentials.md exists, inventories both Supabase projects + the Vercel project + all Edge/Vercel secret NAMES + third-party services, cross-links invoicing-env-reference.md, and contains zero secret values.

docs/admin/handoff-walkthrough.md exists, maps all major components (sophia-bot, admin panel, invoicing bridge, two DBs), cites deploy commands, links every operational runbook, and points ERP closure at /qualia-milestone.
docs/admin/handoff-archival.md exists, records the live gh archive status of QualiaSolutionsCY/sophiainvoice (currently isArchived: true) and the remediation command.

ERP / milestone closure for Milestone 9 is handled via the /qualia-milestone (milestone-close) flow — recorded by the pointer in docs/admin/handoff-walkthrough.md (grep -c "qualia-milestone" → >= 1) and noted in docs/admin/handoff-archival.md.
No task required a human meeting or external action; every AC is checkable by reading a file or running a grep/command.

tasks.title: Credentials & reference handoff doc
acceptance_criteria: Inventories both Supabase projects (primary vceeheaxcrhmpqueudqx, invoice tijadsdysuxkxrpdlecq) with refs/dashboards and the Vercel project sofiatesting.

Lists Edge Function secret NAMES (OPENROUTER_API_KEY, WASEND_API_KEY, WASEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET, RESEND_API_KEY, TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET, CX3_*, ZYPRUS_*, SOPHIA_ADMIN_SECRET, SOPHIA_BRIDGE_SECRET, SENTRY_DSN, FIRECRAWL_API_KEY) and Vercel env var NAMES, grounded in the grep inventory.
Names the third-party services: OpenRouter, WaSenderAPI, Telnyx/3CX, Resend, Zyprus API, Sentry, Firecrawl, Telegram Bot API.
Cross-links (does not duplicate) docs/admin/invoicing-env-reference.md for the invoicing/bridge variable table and rotation procedure.
Contains zero secret values — only NAMES + management surface.
tasks.action: Write docs/admin/handoff-credentials.md with a security banner mirroring invoicing-env-reference.md:7-12, a hosting/data-projects table (two Supabase projects + Vercel project), an Edge-secrets table with supabase secrets management commands (ref vceeheaxcrhmpqueudqx, redeploy sophia-bot after change), a Vercel env-vars section that links the env reference for invoicing/bridge vars and lists broader app var NAMES, a third-party services table, and a related-docs section.

tasks.title: System walkthrough / onboarding doc
acceptance_criteria: Contains an architecture map covering sophia-bot (Edge), the admin panel (/admin), the invoicing surface (/admin/invoices) and the Sophia->invoicing bridge (/api/sophia/intent, HMAC via SOPHIA_BRIDGE_SECRET), and the two Supabase projects.
Explains how to operate/deploy each component citing exact deploy commands from root CLAUDE.md plus the Telegram toggle.

Links every operational runbook: invoicing-runbook.md, invoicing-allowlist.md, invoicing-env-reference.md, phase-3-regression-checklist.md, admin-panel-guide.md, handoff-credentials.md, and handoff-archival.md (the archival-verification doc).
Lists day-1 operational tasks for the new owner.
States ERP/milestone closure is performed via /qualia-milestone, not a manual step.
tasks.action: Write docs/admin/handoff-walkthrough.md with a system map (bridge ASCII flow from .continue-here.md:14-22 + a what-runs-where summary), an operating-each-component section citing root CLAUDE.md deploy commands and the Playwright deploy-gate workaround (.continue-here.md:40), a linked runbooks/references list (including handoff-archival.md), a day-1 checklist, and a milestone/ERP-closure paragraph pointing at /qualia-milestone.

tasks.title: Legacy repo archival verification
acceptance_criteria: Records the live archive status of QualiaSolutionsCY/sophiainvoice from a gh repo view query, including isArchived and the repo URL.
Records that the standalone Vercel project was already deleted (per .continue-here.md:6).
Provides the exact gh repo archive command for the owner to run if the repo were ever found un-archived.
States the current confirmed state (isArchived: true as verified this phase) as a recorded evidence trail.
tasks.action: Run gh repo view QualiaSolutionsCY/sophiainvoice --json isArchived,url,name and capture the JSON into docs/admin/handoff-archival.md as the evidence block (if gh is not authed, record INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE and still include the command). Add a Vercel-deleted note citing .continue-here.md:6, a Remediation section with gh repo archive QualiaSolutionsCY/sophiainvoice --yes, and a closing line that ERP/milestone closure is handled by /qualia-milestone.
